summary: Build an app/tool that calculates pressure level, temperature, and flow based on user inputs.

existing_features.title: Create a calculator app UI that lets a user calculate (1) Pressure, (2) Temperature conversion, and (3) Flow rate from user inputs, and shows the computed results immediately on the page.

Implement the following calculations with unit support and clear formulas displayed in the UI: (A) Pressure: P = F / A with inputs Force and Area and selectable units (Force: N, kN; Area: m², cm²) and output in Pa/kPa. (B) Temperature: conversions between °C, °F, and K. (C) Flow rate: Q = V / t with inputs Volume and Time and selectable units (Volume: m³, L; Time: s, min) and output in m³/s and L/s.
Add input validation and helpful error states for all calculators (e.g., missing inputs, non-numeric values, zero/negative area or time where not allowed) without crashing the app.

Define and apply a coherent visual theme for the app (industrial instrument panel style) using Tailwind styling: neutral dark/gray surfaces, high-contrast typography, and a single accent color (not blue/purple) used consistently for primary actions and highlights.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create an app with user input fields to calculate pressure level, temperature, and flow and display results.

projectName: Pressure, Temperature, and Flow Calculator Tool
